name: obsidian-to-html-project
description: 将Obsidian笔记转换为静态HTML网站

scripts.preprocess: npm run preprocess:frontmatter && npm run preprocess:links && npm run preprocess:math && npm run preprocess:search
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run styles:prod && npm run preprocess && eleventy
scripts.serve: npm run clean && npm run styles && npm run preprocess && eleventy --serve
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run styles:watch & npm run preprocess && eleventy --serve --watch
